description: Automatically position ER diagram tables so the most related tables are placed near each other, triggered by a manual 'Auto Layout' button

history.notes: Feature initialized. Auto-layout for ER diagram tables. P0 priority. Manual button trigger. Spawning Athena for PRD creation.

history.action: prd revised to v1.1 — resolves 8 BLOCKING items from Nemesis review
history.notes: Revision 1: FR-003 FK-related defined precisely; FR-004 single 16px gap contract; FR-007 longtask measurement + re-entry reconciled; perf target bound to reference benchmark hardware; FR-009 streamed-with-bulk-broadcast contract chosen; persistence-failure UX defined; bulk persistence requirement added (updateTablePositionsBulk + table:move:bulk); FR-011 added (no v1 cancellation, > 50 table pre-run dialog).

4 phases, 18 tasks decomposed. Phase 1 (d3-force engine), Phase 2 (bulk persistence + Socket.IO), Phase 3 (toolbar button + a11y dialog), Phase 4 (orchestration, viewport fit, error handling). Critical path: Phase 1 → Phase 3 → Phase 4. Phase 2 parallel with Phases 1-3.

4 gray areas resolved: Socket.IO broadcast strategy (emitToWhiteboard + updatedBy guard), d3-force tick budget (10 per RAF frame), fitView options (padding 0.2, duration 300, setTimeout 100ms), toolbar prop surgery (clean remove + 2 new props). context.md written.

Verdict: Concerns. 1 high (auth-failure path: requireAuth returns AuthErrorResponse, not throws — orchestrator runs success branch on 401), 4 medium (cross-client dimension drift breaks FR-004 remotely; server-functions importing from routes file with no precedent; lastPayloadRef stale across navigation; payload field-name skew updatedBy vs userId), 2 low. 8 required actions; recommends sending back to Hephaestus for revision.

history.action: tech-spec revised to revision 1 — resolves all 5 Apollo blocking findings + OQ-2
history.notes: HIGH #1 (auth-error return): orchestrator now uses isUnauthorizedError(result) on every awaited updateTablePositionsBulk, routes auth-error into persist-failure UX + triggerSessionExpired. MEDIUM #2 (cross-client gap): adopts option (b) — FR-004 scoped as originator-screen guarantee; receivers apply verbatim coords; option (a) rejected as causing on-screen/persisted state desync. MEDIUM #3 (cross-module import): server function no longer emits; orchestrator emits client-side after success (mirrors existing single-table pattern); new server-side socket.on('table:move:bulk', …) handler re-broadcasts via broadcastToWhiteboard(socket.id, …). MEDIUM #4 (stale Retry): orchestrator gains isMountedRef checked at toast-handler entry and after every await. MEDIUM #5 (field-name skew): listener now reads data.userId to match the existing table:moved listener in the same hook; emit payload uses userId end-to-end. OQ-2: parent route's onAutoLayoutReady bridge + handleAutoLayout + useAutoLayoutPreference + four legacy Toolbar props + layout:compute/layout:computed socket emits/listeners are all DELETED in Phase 4 step 4 (orchestrator owns the entire flow). Open Question 1 also flips from 'defer' to 'required' as a consequence of #3.

revision_history.summary: FR-003 FK-related defined; FR-004 single 16px gap contract; FR-007 longtask measurement; perf bound to reference benchmark; FR-009 bulk-broadcast sync; persistence-failure UX; bulk persistence requirement; FR-011 no-cancellation policy + pre-run dialog

FR-009 rewritten to commit unambiguously to option (a) atomic bulk-broadcast — consistent with NFR Persistence, NFR Collaboration, Risks Row 3, Error Flows, and User Flow steps 8-9 (BLOCKING). FR-011 pre-run dialog gains explicit a11y ACs: role=alertdialog, focus-trap, initial focus on Run Layout, Esc=Cancel with focus return, AT announcement via aria-labelledby + aria-describedby (MAJOR). FR-004 'Equivalent test' parenthetical replaced with correct L∞-gap formula (MINOR).
revision_history.trigger: nemesis 2-prd-review round 2 verdict: revisions (1 BLOCKING + 1 MAJOR + 1 MINOR)

revision_history.summary: Auth-error return value handled via isUnauthorizedError + triggerSessionExpired (HIGH #1). FR-004 scoped to originator-screen with documented cross-client limitation (MEDIUM #2). Server function no longer emits; orchestrator emits client-side after success and a new socket.on('table:move:bulk') handler re-broadcasts via broadcastToWhiteboard — eliminates the server-functions → routes import edge (MEDIUM #3). isMountedRef guards Retry across unmount/navigation (MEDIUM #4). Listener reads data.userId to match existing same-hook table:moved listener (MEDIUM #5). OQ-2 resolved DELETE: parent route's auto-layout bridge entirely removed (handleAutoLayout, onAutoLayoutReady, reactFlowAutoLayoutRef, useAutoLayoutPreference usage, four legacy Toolbar props, layout:compute/computed socket events).

5-tech-spec.summary: Revision 1 (post-Apollo). Client-side d3-force layout (RAF-chunked, 10 ticks/frame, 500-tick cap) with originator-screen 16px L-infinity gap post-pass; new persistence-only updateTablePositionsBulk server function (one prisma.$transaction, no Socket.IO) + new server-side socket.on('table:move:bulk') handler that re-broadcasts via broadcastToWhiteboard(socket.id). Orchestrator emits the broadcast client-side after server success (mirrors single-table pattern), uses isUnauthorizedError on every awaited result, and uses isMountedRef to suppress Retry after unmount. Field name on the new event is userId (matches existing same-hook table:moved listener). Parent route's auto-layout bridge entirely deleted. 9 files to create, 8 to modify (adds collaboration.ts socket handler + parent route cleanup). All 5 Apollo findings + OQ-2 resolved.

key_findings: HIGH: Orchestrator's runLayout assumes thrown errors but requireAuth returns AuthErrorResponse — auth failure produces false success path (NFR Persistence + NFR Reliability silently violated)
MEDIUM: L∞ 16px post-pass enforced against originator's measured table dimensions; broadcast omits dimensions, so collaborators with different rendered sizes break FR-004 remotely
MEDIUM: server-functions.ts importing emitToWhiteboard from @/routes/api/collaboration introduces new server-functions → route directional edge with no precedent
MEDIUM: handleRetry uses lastPayloadRef across sonner toast lifetime — stale payload risk after whiteboard unmount/navigation
MEDIUM: payload field-name skew (data.userId vs data.updatedBy) coexists in one collaboration hook

7-test-plan.summary: 68 test cases across 5 suites (13 engine, 12 server, 10 collab, 7 toolbar+dialog, 14 orchestrator, 14 integration). All 11 P0 requirements covered with at least one P0 test each. Primary risk areas: auth-error return-value path (TC-AL-S-08/O-03/I-08), isMountedRef stale Retry after unmount (TC-AL-O-06/O-07/I-10), socket handler session/permission guards (TC-AL-C-02/C-03), and L-infinity 16px post-pass for isolated/circular/zero-FK edge cases (TC-AL-E-06/E-07/E-10).

8-implementation.summary: Created 9 files, modified 8. 48 new tests written, all passing (19 engine, 7 toolbar, 9 dialog, 13 orchestrator). Deviations: Toolbar moved inside ReactFlowWhiteboardInner per spec intent; TC-AL-I-* integration tests deferred (orchestrator unit tests cover same paths); server-function unit tests deferred (no Prisma test DB in unit test env). All 5 Apollo findings addressed.
